comment: Voices demonstrated on decklight.io. Audio lives ONLY in the decklight.github.io repo (voices/<dir>/); generate/refresh locally with: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=<project> node tools/voiceover.mjs demo/showcase.html --engine gemini --voice <Voice> --no-llm -o demo/voiceover-site/<dir>  (incremental: only changed slides re-synthesize), then upload the changed files to the site repo.
